notes: Built by adapting the hardened `google` app: config (Store ID + write-only Store Secret), Ratio OAuth + token refresh, catalog transform/sync to Wizzy /products/save|delete, all=true bulk sync + hourly reconcile, SQS sync worker, guarded ScriptTag SDK (pending_api), product webhooks. Inherits the google fixes: prices are PAISE (/100), catalog fetch uses ?all=true (the API ignores page), webhook dedup via x-webhook-id, write-only-secret UI. Backend tsc + 251 tests green; admin-wizzy tsc + 11 tests + build green; migration 0001 applied locally. OPEN: Wizzy API base/headers + /products payload shape + ScriptTag API paths are placeholders (TBD with the Wizzy team) - see wizzy-api.client.ts / wizzy-transform.ts / script-tag.client.ts comments.

history.note: Added the storefront search SDK (packages/wizzy-sdk: overlay + faceted results, direct-to-Wizzy public API) + backend /wizzy/sdk/* serving + admin Storefront Search screen + migration 0003. Part B: storefront SDK promoted to an opt-in pillar (packages/_template-sdk, hasStorefrontSdk). pnpm verify + size-limit + Playwright E2E green. See docs/agent/changes/wizzy-storefront-sdk/.
